name: The Unraveling
effect: Produce a document that describes the spaghetti in detail. This card is considered actionable.

clauses.name: DOCUMENTATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the spaghetti is named in the document: It is considered understood.

clauses.name: COMPLEXITY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the document exceeds forty slides: The spaghetti is considered unwound.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next quarter: The document is considered a starting point for a new document.
